_meta.author: ruixen.ui
_meta.title: Scroll FAQ Accordion
_meta.description: ScrollFAQAccordion is a modern, scroll-driven FAQ accordion built with React, Radix UI, Framer Motion, and GSAP. Unlike traditional accordions, it automatically opens each FAQ item as the user scrolls, providing a smooth, interactive, and visually engaging experience. Manual clicks are disabled to maintain a fully scroll-triggered behavior, while motion animations and responsive styling ensure each question and answer appears seamlessly. This component is perfect for landing pages, product documentation, or any interface where you want to guide users through content progressively as they scroll.
